backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three 'Position Holes' button/editor features to their implementing files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Ocarina Composer app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Ocarina Composer app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component managing composition state, ocarina settings, and rendering all major UI sections including a 'Position Holes' button that opens HolePositioningEditor in a Dialog modal.
frontend/src/components/CompositionContr: Control panel component for selecting note duration and playing/stopping the composition using Web Audio API with ADSR synthesis, including support for C6 at 1046.50 Hz.
Dialog-based fingering configuration component allowing users to toggle hole states per note with a visual 2x2 grid layout, supporting all notes including C6.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a sticky top navigation header with the app logo icon and 'Ocarina Composer' title/subtitle.
frontend/src/components/HolePositioningE: Interactive drag-and-drop editor for repositioning ocarina finger holes over a photo or stock image, with touch/mouse support, rotation controls, and optional Save/Cancel modal actions.
Settings panel for configuring ocarina appearance (hole/body shape, colors, photo upload) and fingering chart, composing hooks for colors, photo, hole positions, and rotation.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaTablature: Renders a small 4-hole ocarina tablature diagram for a given pitch, filling holes according to the fingering chart and current color settings.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaVisual.ts: Displays a large visual ocarina body (photo or styled SVG-like div) with draggable holes highlighted based on the current note's fingering pattern and rotation.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: Renders a clickable piano keyboard (white and black keys for one octave) that triggers a callback with the selected note pitch.
frontend/src/components/SheetMusic.tsx: Displays the composed note sequence as sheet music with duration symbols, note names, ocarina tablature, and inline lyrics editing, supporting selection, deletion, and playback highlighting.
frontend/src/components/SongMetadata.tsx: React component for editing and saving song title and description, with a simulated save (no real backend) that validates inputs and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomHolePosition: Custom hook that manages persisted custom ocarina hole positions in localStorage, with helpers to get, set, and reset positions per body shape.
frontend/src/hooks/useFingeringChart.ts: Custom hook that loads, persists, and manages a fingering chart in localStorage, with functions to update individual note patterns and reset to defaults.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useModelRotation.ts: Custom hook that persists and manages the ocarina model rotation (0, 90, 180, or 270 degrees) in localStorage, defaulting to 90.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaColors.ts: Custom hook that persists and manages ocarina SVG color settings (hole fill, hole stroke, body fill, body outline) in localStorage with reset-to-defaults support.
frontend/src/hooks/useOcarinaPhoto.ts: Custom hook that stores and retrieves a user-uploaded ocarina photo as a base64 data URL in localStorage, with upload and remove helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines placeholder React Query hooks for future backend integration; currently useGetSongs returns an empty array.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a cn helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/types/fingering.ts: TypeScript type definitions for ocarina fingering, including HoleId, FingeringPattern, FingeringChart, and the list of supported note names.
frontend/src/utils/defaultFingeringChart: Exports the default 4-hole ocarina fingering chart mapping each note (C through C6) to its hole-coverage pattern.
frontend/src/utils/holeLayout.ts: Exports types and a getHoleLayout function that returns fixed x/y pixel positions for the four ocarina holes within a 384×224px container.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), oklch-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a 4-hole ocarina tablature music writing app, including its architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata.
